ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event record */,
  "iso" INTEGER /* ISO code representing the event's geographic region */,
  "event_id_cnty" TEXT /* Event ID within the country */,
  "event_id_no_cnty" TEXT /* Event ID without county specificity */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the event */,
  "time_precision" INTEGER /* Precision of time recorded */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., Protests, Battles) */,
  "sub_event_type" TEXT /* Sub-type of event (e.g., Peaceful protest, Armed clash) */,
  "actor1" TEXT /* Primary actor involved in the event */,
  "assoc_actor_1" TEXT /* Associated actor 1 involved in the event */,
  "inter1" INTEGER /* Interaction type for actor 1 */,
  "actor2" TEXT /* Secondary actor involved in the event */,
  "assoc_actor_2" TEXT /* Associated actor 2 involved in the event */,
  "inter2" INTEGER /* Interaction type for actor 2 */,
  "interaction" INTEGER /* Nature of interaction (e.g., confrontation, cooperation) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the event */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the event occurred */,
  "admin1" TEXT /* First administrative division (state/province) of the event */,
  "admin2" TEXT /* Second administrative division (county/district) of the event */,
  "admin3" TEXT /* Third administrative division, if applicable */,
  "location" TEXT /* Specific location of the event */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the event location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the event location */,
  "geo_precision" INTEGER /* Precision of geographic information */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source from where the event data was obtained */,
  "source_scale" TEXT /* Scale of the source (e.g., National, Subnational) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes providing additional context or details about the event */,
  "fatalities" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities resulting from the event */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of data entry or record creation */,
  "iso3" TEXT /* ISO3 code representing the event's country */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the event has been verified */,
  "verified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who verified the event */,
  "verification_date" TEXT /* Date the event was verified */,
  "event_category" TEXT /* Category of the event (e.g., Human Rights, Social Justice) */,
  "event_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the event (e.g., Protests, Conflicts) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_verified_by FOREIGN KEY ("verified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_actor2 FOREIGN KEY ("actor2") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES sources ("source_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_actor1 FOREIGN KEY ("actor1") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor involved in events */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Affiliated organization of the actor, if applicable */,
  "actor_type" TEXT /* Type of actor (e.g., Individual, Government, NGO) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the actor */,
  "actor_category" TEXT /* Category of the actor (e.g., Government, Non-State Actor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actors_organization FOREIGN KEY ("organization") REFERENCES organizations ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., Media, Government Report, NGO) */,
  "scale" TEXT /* Scale of the source (e.g., National, International) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the source, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fatalities" (
  "fatality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fatality record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event associated with the fatalities */,
  "fatality_count" INTEGER /* Count of fatalities reported for the event */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the fatalities */,
  "fatality_type" TEXT /* Type of fatality (e.g., Civilian, Military) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fatality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fatalities_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Researcher, Analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "organization_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID that the subcategory belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_actor_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the actor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the actor in the event (e.g., Primary, Secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id")
)
